subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-11 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: One must look at things with a view to learning from them. Should he fail to open the eye of receptivity to such lessons
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیده عبرت باید اگر انسان چشم عبرت باز ننماید چه فائده دارد هر روز دو کرور
subcodes.subjects: @spirit and form in the administration, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
